title: [cross-impl] Add full OSCORE vector interop test between Python and C/Zephyr
description: C implementation in lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/ (oscore.c, hkdf.c, coap_oscore.c) lacks byte-exact roundtrip tests against test/vectors/oscore.json that Python (python/src/lichen/crypto/oscore.py + test_oscore_vectors.py) fully exercises. Manual CBOR construction for HKDF info, AAD, Enc_structure may diverge on edge cases (empty IDs, null id_context, long values). Add C test that loads JSON vectors, runs protect/unprotect and asserts exact match to Python/aiocoap outputs. Priority 1 to ensure consistency before Phase 5 security.
